languages.text: {n}Капитан Дунавски отдает честь. Былой огонь в ее уцелевшем глазу погас, а на лицо легла печать ответственности.{/n}
languages.translation_comment: Если не взяли Ведку архимилитантом и ее не казнил Иждриг (этюд DW_IzdrigKillVedka не играет)
Если не взяли Ведку архимилитантом и ее не казнил Иждриг (этюд DW_IzdrigKillVedka не играет)

languages.text: {n}Captain Dunawski salutes. The light that once shone in her surviving eye has dimmed and the solemn weight of responsibility has settled upon her features.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Капитан Дунавски отдает честь. Былой огонь в ее уцелевшем глазу погас, а на лицо легла печать ответственности.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Captain Dunawski salutes. The former fire in her surviving eye has dimmed, and a solemn weight of responsibility has settled upon her features.{/n}
{n}Captain Dunawski salutes. The former fire in her surviving eye has dimmed, and a solemn weight of responsibility has settled upon her features.{/n}

{n}Captain Dunawski salutes. The light that once shone in her surviving eye has dimmed and the solemn weight of responsibility has settled upon her features.{/n}

languages.text: {n}杜纳芙斯卡上尉行了个军礼。她仅存的那只眼睛里，往日的神采已然黯淡，取而代之的是眉宇之间那沉甸甸的责任感。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Captain Dunawski salutes. The light that once shone in her surviving eye has dimmed and the solemn weight of responsibility has settled upon her features.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}杜纳芙斯卡上尉行了个军礼。她仅存的那只眼睛里，往日的神采已然黯淡，取而代之的是眉宇之间那沉甸甸的责任感。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Yüzbaşı Dunawski selam veriyor. Kalan gözünde bir zamanlar parlayan ışık sönmüş, omuzlarına ağır bir sorumluluk yüklenmiş gibi görünüyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Captain Dunawski salutes. The light that once shone in her surviving eye has dimmed and the solemn weight of responsibility has settled upon her features.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Yüzbaşı Dunawski selam veriyor. Kalan gözünde bir zamanlar parlayan ışık sönmüş, omuzlarına ağır bir sorumluluk yüklenmiş gibi görünüyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La capitaine Dunawski vous salue. La lueur qui illuminait auparavant son unique œil s'est ternie et son visage accuse le poids solennel de la responsabilité qui pèse désormais sur ses épaules.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Captain Dunawski salutes. The light that once shone in her surviving eye has dimmed and the solemn weight of responsibility has settled upon her features.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La capitaine Dunawski vous salue. La lueur qui illuminait auparavant son unique œil s'est ternie et son visage accuse le poids solennel de la responsabilité qui pèse désormais sur ses épaules.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La capitana Dunawski se cuadra. La luz que antes brillaba en el ojo que le queda es tenue y el solemne peso de la responsabilidad recae sobre sus rasgos.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Captain Dunawski salutes. The light that once shone in her surviving eye has dimmed and the solemn weight of responsibility has settled upon her features.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La capitana Dunawski se cuadra. La luz que antes brillaba en el ojo que le queda es tenue y el solemne peso de la responsabilidad recae sobre sus rasgos.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Captain Dunawski salutiert. Der einstige Glanz in ihren Augen ist verblasst und der feierlichen Bürde der Verantwortung gewichen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Captain Dunawski salutes. The light that once shone in her surviving eye has dimmed and the solemn weight of responsibility has settled upon her features.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Captain Dunawski salutiert. Der einstige Glanz in ihren Augen ist verblasst und der feierlichen Bürde der Verantwortung gewichen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ダンワスキー艦長が敬礼する。生き残った彼女の目はかつて輝いていたが、今は暗く、責任の重さが彼女の顔に刻まれている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Captain Dunawski salutes. The light that once shone in her surviving eye has dimmed and the solemn weight of responsibility has settled upon her features.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}ダンワスキー艦長が敬礼する。生き残った彼女の目はかつて輝いていたが、今は暗く、責任の重さが彼女の顔に刻まれている。{/n}
